title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Oliveboard Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Oliveboard Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Oliveboard Holdings Services family as a Instructional Designer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Oliveboard Holdings Services:
Oliveboard Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard Holdings Services!
